steps.title: Find the shared input
steps.content: The function $p$ has slope $7$, so write $p(x)=7x+b$. Use $p(3)=30$: $$7(3)+b=30$$ $$b=9$$ Then use $p(c)=-5$: $$7c+9=-5$$ $$c=-2$$

steps.title: Find the slope of t
steps.content: Since $c=-2$, the function $t$ passes through $(-2,-4)$ and $(4,44)$. Its slope is $$\frac{44-(-4)}{4-(-2)}=\frac{48}{6}=8$$ The answer is D.
